metadata.title: MRPack to ZIP Converter
metadata.description: Convert a .mrpack file to a .zip copy locally in your browser for tools that expect a ZIP archive extension.

tool.title: Convert .mrpack to .zip locally
tool.description: A Modrinth .mrpack file is ZIP-based. This browser-local utility creates a .zip copy without uploading the file.

workflow.title: When a ZIP copy helps
workflow.description: Use this only when a tool can read the archive but rejects the .mrpack extension.

items.title: Keep the original
items.description: Do not delete the .mrpack file. Some launchers need the original extension and metadata.

items.title: Convert locally
items.description: The browser creates a ZIP copy using the same file bytes.

items.title: Validate compatibility
items.description: A ZIP extension does not guarantee another launcher can install the modpack correctly.

items.question: Is a .mrpack file really a ZIP archive?
items.answer: The format is ZIP-based, but the modpack metadata still matters for launcher compatibility.

items.question: Does this tool download mods or validate the pack?
items.answer: No. It only creates a local ZIP copy and does not fetch external files.

items.question: Is my modpack uploaded?
items.answer: No. The conversion runs in the browser session.
